nodes.name: Webhook - Quote Request
nodes.notes: Receives data from Google Form or LINE OA. Configure Google Form to POST to this webhook URL via Apps Script, or connect via Make.com intermediary.

nodes.name: Normalize & Calculate CBM
nodes.notes: Validates input, calculates CBM and chargeable weight, generates Quote ID.

nodes.name: Get Rate Table
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your actual Google Sheets ID. Sheet name must be 'RateTable'.

nodes.name: Calculate Price
nodes.notes: Looks up rate from RateTable and calculates total quoted price. USD_THB is read from $env.USD_THB (required). Land shipments always set requiresManualQuote=true. Surcharges applied only from numeric verified columns.

nodes.name: Log to Quote Sheet
nodes.notes: Appends new DRAFT row to QuoteLog sheet. Quote Status is always DRAFT at this stage.

parameters.jsCode:
// Build approval notification message
const d = $input.first().json;
const status = d.requiresManualQuote ? '⚠️ ต้องคำนวณราคาเอง' : '✅ คำนวณอัตโนมัติ';

const message = [
  '🚢 [FREIGHT QUOTE REQUEST — DRAFT]',
  `📋 Quote No: ${d.quoteId}`,
  `👤 ลูกค้า: ${d.customerName}`,
  `📞 ติดต่อ: ${d.contact}`,
  `📦 เส้นทาง: ${d.origin} → ${d.destination}`,
  `🚀 ประเภท: ${d.shipmentType}`,
  `⚖️  น้ำหนัก: ${d.weightKg} kg | CBM: ${d.cbm}`,
  `💰 ราคาที่แนะนำ: ${d.totalPrice?.toLocaleString() || 'N/A'} THB`,
  `📅 Transit: ${d.transitDays || 'N/A'}`,
  status,
  '',
  '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━',
  '⚠️ กรุณาตรวจสอบและอนุมัติก่อนส่งให้ลูกค้า',
  `👉 เปิด Google Sheets: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/${$env.GOOGLE_SHEET_ID || "CONFIGURE_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID"}`,
  `หา Quote ID: ${d.quoteId} → เปลี่ยน Status เป็น Approved`
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...d, notificationMessage: message } }];

nodes.name: Build Approval Notification
nodes.notes: Formats the LINE Notify / Email approval message.

nodes.name: LINE Notify - Human Approval
nodes.notes: Sends approval notification to LINE Notify. Get token at notify-bot.line.me/my. Replace YOUR_LINE_NOTIFY_TOKEN.

nodes.name: Email - Human Approval Backup
nodes.notes: Backup email notification. Set SALES_EMAIL and MANAGER_EMAIL in n8n environment variables.

nodes.name: Webhook - Quote Approved
nodes.notes: Triggered when a quote is approved. Can be called manually from Google Sheets Apps Script, or from a simple approval web form. POST body: { quoteId, approvedBy, customerContact, totalPrice, customerName }

parameters.jsCode:
// Build customer-facing quote message
const d = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;

const message = [
  '🚢 ใบเสนอราคาขนส่งสินค้า',
  `━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━`,
  `📋 เลขที่: ${d.quoteId}`,
  `👤 เรียน: ${d.customerName}`,
  `📦 เส้นทาง: ${d.origin || ''} → ${d.destination || ''}`,
  `🚀 ประเภท: ${d.shipmentType || ''}`,
  `━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━`,
  `💰 ราคารวม: ${parseFloat(d.totalPrice || 0).toLocaleString()} THB`,
  `📅 ระยะเวลา: ${d.transitDays || 'ติดต่อสอบถาม'} วัน`,
  `⏰ ราคามีผลถึง: ${d.validUntil || '30 วัน'}`,
  `━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━`,
  '✅ หากต้องการยืนยันการจอง',
  'กรุณาตอบกลับข้อความนี้หรือโทร [เบอร์ติดต่อ]',
  '',
  'ขอบคุณที่ไว้วางใจในบริการของเรา 🙏'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...d, customerMessage: message } }];

nodes.name: Build Customer Quote Message
nodes.notes: Formats the customer-facing quotation message after approval.

nodes.name: Send Quote to Customer (LINE)
nodes.notes: Sends approved quote to customer via LINE Messaging API. Requires LINE Channel Access Token.

value.Follow-up Date: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() + 3); return d.toISOString().slice(0,10); })() }}

nodes.name: Update Sheet - Approved & Sent
nodes.notes: Updates the quote row in Google Sheets to Approved and records sent date.

nodes.name: Daily Follow-up Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every 24 hours to check for quotes that need follow-up.

nodes.name: Filter Due Follow-ups
nodes.notes: Filters quotes where today is the follow-up date and no response yet.

nodes.name: Follow-up Reminder Notify
nodes.notes: Sends daily follow-up reminders to the team via LINE Notify.

meta.description: Freight Forwarding Quotation Automation — PILOT V1 (Draft-Only Supervised Mode). Receives quote requests, calculates prices from Rate Table using USD_THB from $env.USD_THB, logs DRAFT quotes to Google Sheets, notifies team for HUMAN APPROVAL via LINE + Email. No customer-facing message is sent automatically. Land shipments and unknown routes always set requiresManualQuote=true.
setupInstructions: 1. Set GOOGLE_SHEET_ID in n8n environment variables (Settings → Variables)
2. Set USD_THB in n8n environment variables — current exchange rate, e.g. 35.50 (REQUIRED)
3. Set QUOTE_VALIDITY_DAYS in n8n environment variables, e.g. 30
4. Set SALES_EMAIL in n8n environment variables (sender email)
5. Set MANAGER_EMAIL in n8n environment variables (approval recipient)
6. Set LINE_NOTIFY_TOKEN in n8n environment variables (from notify-bot.line.me/my)
7. Configure Google Sheets credentials (Service Account or OAuth2) in n8n Credentials
8. Configure Gmail credentials in n8n Credentials
9. Configure LINE Notify credentials in n8n Credentials
10. Configure LINE Messaging API credentials in n8n Credentials (for post-approval send to customer)
11. Fill RateTable in Google Sheets with verified live rates before activating
12. Activate workflow — all generated quotes are DRAFT status until human approval webhook is called
